scope.summary: Creates and edits Power Apps Canvas Apps through the Canvas Authoring MCP server, including app YAML validation, control discovery, API and connector discovery, data source schema discovery, and live coauthoring sync.

externalNetworkCalls: Connector and data source metadata services

servers.name: canvas-authoring
servers.purpose: Power Apps Canvas Authoring MCP server for app creation and coauthoring.

dependencies.name: Canvas Authoring MCP server (.NET runtime)
dependencies.description: Requires .NET runtime and dnx to install the prerelease Canvas Authoring MCP package.

dependencies.name: Power Apps environment with canvas app creation rights
dependencies.description: User must have Maker role or equivalent in the target environment. DLP policies affect which connectors are available to generated apps but do not block the plugin itself.

dependencies.name: Power Apps Studio coauthoring access
dependencies.description: Live coauthoring sync requires access to the Power Apps authoring service.

technologies.name: .NET
technologies.usedFor: Required runtime for dnx and Canvas Authoring MCP server.

exceptions: Canvas Apps use platform-native controls rather than React components. EDS should still influence accessibility and design guidance where applicable.

blockers: Internal owner and support channel are not assigned.
Skills, agents, and MCP configuration are not reviewed against Equinor guidance.
MCP server is installed through dnx with prerelease package use and no explicit version pinning.
Production-system interaction is possible by default through live coauthoring and authoring service access.
Dependencies and environment prerequisites are not fully documented.
Technology Radar status is unknown for .NET in this context.
GitHub Copilot marketplace manifest is missing.

evidence.summary: Documents Canvas Authoring MCP tools, coauthoring, connector discovery, and security notes.
Registers Canvas Authoring MCP through dnx, prerelease package, and NuGet source.

notes: Initial review record only. This record intentionally defers publication until detailed review evidence exists.
